---
title: "People"
subtitle: "Who we are"
#image: files/group.jpeg
page-layout: full
date-format: "YYYY-MM"
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs

- id: pi
  sort: "lastname asc"
  type: default
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
  image-height: 400px
  image-align: left
  contents: 
    - people/pi.yml

- id: staff
  sort: "lastname asc"
  type: default
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
  image-height: 400px
  image-align: left
  contents: 
    - people/staff.yml

- id: postdoc
  sort: "lastname asc"
  type: default
  # fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
  image-height: 400px
  image-align: left
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true 
  contents: 
    - people/postdocs

- id: grad-student
  sort: "lastname asc"
  type: default
  # fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
  image-height: 400px
  image-align: left
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true 
  contents: 
    - people/grad-students
    - people/grad-student.yml

- id: undergrad-student
  sort: "lastname asc"
  type: default
  # fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
  image-height: 400px
  image-align: left
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true 
  contents: 
    - people/undergrad-students

- id: affiliates
  sort:
    - "lastname asc"  
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center  
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 300px
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  contents: 
    - /people/affiliates.yml

- id: lab-alumni
  sort: 
    - "ended desc"
    - "lastname asc"  
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center  
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 300px
  field-display-names: 
      title: "Name"
      subtitle: "Role"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  contents: 
    - /people/alumni.yml

 

page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
toc: false

format:
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
---


## Principal Investigator

:::{#pi}
:::

## Research Staff

:::{#staff}
:::

<!-- ## Postdocs

:::{#postdoc}
::: -->

## Graduate Students

:::{#grad-student}
:::

<!-- ## Undergraduate Students

:::{#undergrad-student}
::: -->

## Affiliates

:::{#affiliates}
:::


## Alumni

:::{#lab-alumni}
:::
